name: generate_employee_certificate
script:
employee_name = frappe.form_dict.get("employee")
template_name = frappe.form_dict.get("template")

employee = frappe.get_doc("Employee", employee_name)
template = frappe.get_doc("Employee Certificate Template", template_name)

html = frappe.render_template(template.html_template, {"doc": employee})
pdf_content = frappe.utils.pdf.get_pdf(html)

cert = frappe.get_doc({
    "doctype": "Employee Certificate",
    "employee": employee_name,
    "template": template_name,
    "generated_on": frappe.utils.now_datetime(),
    "generated_by": frappe.session.user
})
cert.insert(ignore_permissions=True)

file_doc = frappe.get_doc({
    "doctype": "File",
    "file_name": f"{cert.name}.pdf",
    "attached_to_doctype": "Employee Certificate",
    "attached_to_name": cert.name,
    "content": pdf_content,
    "is_private": 1
})
file_doc.save(ignore_permissions=True)

cert.certificate_pdf = file_doc.file_url
cert.save(ignore_permissions=True)
frappe.db.commit()

frappe.response["message"] = {"certificate": cert.name, "pdf_url": file_doc.file_url}
